title: Enable strict TypeScript mode and fix type errors
description: Update tsconfig.json to enable strict: true, noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks, etc. Then fix all resulting type errors across the codebase to improve type safety and reduce runtime bugs.

title: Add keyboard navigation support for modal dialogs
description: Ensure all modal dialogs can be opened, navigated, and closed using only keyboard (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Escape). This improves accessibility and power user experience.

title: Implement automatic dependency updates via Renovate or Dependabot
description: Configure a dependency update bot (like Renovate) to automatically create pull requests for outdated dependencies, keeping the project secure and up-to-date.
